since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +1.95% · Gold +0.35% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.56%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.78%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +3.04%, ADBE +2.29%, ADBE +2.29%, PLTR +2.12%, DV +1.50%. Laggards: BIDU -4.78%, DELL -2.65%, MU -2.45%, ARM -2.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.68% at $156.47
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
